mapper.select: SELECT * FROM user_subscription WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT * FROM user_subscription WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_active = #{active} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT * FROM user_subscription WHERE is_active = true AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY created_at DESC
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO user_subscription ( user_id, symbol, symbol_type, symbol_name, target_change_percent, is_active, description, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES
( #{item.userId}, #{item.symbol}, #{item.symbolType}, #{item.symbolName}, #{item.targetChangePercent}, #{item.isActive}, #{item.description}, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user_subscription WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND deleted = 0
AND symbol LIKE CONCAT('%', #{symbol}, '%')
AND symbol_type = #{symbolType}
AND is_active = (CASE WHEN #{status} = 'ACTIVE' THEN true ELSE false END)
mapper.update:
UPDATE user_subscription SET is_active = #{active}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id IN
#{id}
